title: AudioCues — w2c-sound-design output contract
description: Mirrors AudioCues/AudioCueSfx (@studio/sound-kit audioCuesTypes.ts, re-exported at remotion-svg-primitives/src/lesson-media/audioCuesTypes.ts). SEMANTIC only: bed/sting/sfx are library KEYS (plain strings), event is the composer's FIXED vocabulary, and there is no frame field anywhere. additionalProperties:false at every level is deliberate — it is what turns a nested {key:"..."} wrapper (the wrong shape a weak executor reaches for) into a hard type failure instead of a silently-accepted extra field.

lessonId.description: Copied verbatim from {{arg.lessonId}} — the provenance every downstream node trusts.

bed.description: A bed KEY (a plain string), never an object. Live membership in shared-sound's _beds/_index.json is NOT checkable by a static schema — see criteria.md 'registry-membership follow-on'.

toneSafe.description: true only for pinyin/lexical-tone-discrimination lessons (SKILL bed table).

resolve.description: A boolean ENVELOPE FLAG (the bed rises to full) — never an asset key string.

sfx.description: Zero or more motivated beats (a sparse lesson may legitimately sonify nothing).

cue.description: Cue id into the reconciled timeline.

event.description: The composer's CLOSED vocabulary (SfxEventType). Any other value — however descriptive of the motion (e.g. 'objectLift', 'title-settle') — is off-contract: the composer has no frame mapping for it and it will silently fail to sonify.

sound.description: A sound KEY, plain string, from the fixed SFX vocabulary or the shared library.

perStep.description: count beats only: one tick per counted item.

risingPitch.description: count beats only: ascend pitch per step [ASSUMED].
